channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: USC QB Miller Moss enters transfer portal after losing starting job to Jayden Maiava
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Southern California quarterback Miller Moss is entering the transfer portal after losing the Trojans' starting job last month. Moss made his announcement on social media Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Florida State hires Nebraska's Tony White as defensive coordinator, AP source says
item.description: Florida State has hired Tony White to be its defensive coordinator after he developed consecutive top-20 defenses at Nebraska.
item.dc:creator: Mark Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ryan Poles to remain Bears general manager and lead search for new head coach
item.description: Chicago Bears president Kevin Warren said Ryan Poles will remain the general manager and serves as the point person in the search for a head coach to replace the fired Matt Eberflus.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Seligman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kansas holds off Auburn for No. 1 in AP Top 25 as SEC grabs 3 of top 4 spots; UConn slides to No. 25
item.description: Kansas continues to hold the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press Top 25 men’s college basketball poll.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: French fans belt out homophobic chants with 'complete impunity' during game, campaign group says
item.description: A French campaign group has renewed calls for authorities to take action against homophobic chanting by soccer fans, saying Marseille supporters belted out anti-gay slurs “with complete impunity” during a home game against Monaco on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SAMUEL PETREQUIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Top 25 Extra Points: No. 4 Irish still draw on lessons learned from humbling loss to N. Illinois
item.description: Now Notre Dame waits. The Fighting Irish will find out next Sunday if they'll play at home in the first round of the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CU Buffs await bowl selection
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Buffaloes won't be heading to the Big 12 title game, but they're still sitting comfortably in the AP Top 25 at No. 20. With nine wins, including seven in conference play, it's a season most Buffs fans would call a success. Now, it's a waiting game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz come up short against Lakers, 105-104
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anthony Davis had 33 points and 11 rebounds, LeBron James added 27 points and 14 assists, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers beat the Utah Jazz 105-104 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Josh Allen makes NFL history as Bills clinch AFC East with win over 49ers in driving snow
item.description: Buffalo Bills star Josh Allen had a career night as he became the first quarterback to record a passing, rushing and receiving touchdown in the same game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steelers tie NFL record with 21 consecutive non-losing seasons after win over Bengals
item.description: Mike Tomlin has not had a losing season since he took over as Pittsburgh Steelers head coach, and he solidified another year of being above .500 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: ROSEMONT, Ill. (AP) — The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Atkins reaches 2,000 yards as USF Bulls fall at Rice
item.description: South Florida (6-6; 4-4 American) fell to Rice (4-8; 3-5 American), 35-28, Saturday as the Bulls closed out the regular season in the program’s first-ever game at Rice Stadium in Houston.
item.dc:creator: USF Football, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU eliminated from Big 12 contention, beats Houston
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU learned it was eliminated from Big 12 Championship Game contention at halftime, but the Cougars still had a job to do. Jake Retzlaff ran for two touchdowns and threw for 167 yards to lead No. 19 BYU to a 30-18 victory over Houston on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jaxson Stauber shuts out Vegas in season debut, 6-0
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Jaxson Stauber made 29 saves for his first NHL shutout, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 6-0 at T-Mobile Arena on Saturday. It was Stauber’s debut for Utah, his seventh NHL game and his first since Feb. 22, 2023, with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kyrie Irving scores 30 to lead Dallas past Jazz, 106-94
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Kyrie Irving went for 30 points, as the Dallas Mavericks beat the Utah Jazz for a second time this season, 106-94.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes close disappointing season with 28-14 victory
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Utah forced three turnovers and scored two defensive touchdowns Friday night, including a 60-yard pick-6 by Zemaiah Vaughn, as the Utes snapped a seven-game losing streak with a 28-14 victory over UCF.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tom Wilson's power-play goal lifts the Capitals over the Lightning 5-4
item.description: Tom Wilson scored a power-play goal with 3:26 left in regulation to lift the Washington Capitals to a 5-4 victory against the Tampa Bay Lightning on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New York Jets hire 33rd team to assist in hiring process
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- An organizational shift is upon us for the New York Jets. Owner Woody Johnson has hired the 33rd team which was founded by former Jets GM Mike Tannenbaum in 2019, to help aid the Jets search.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Blake Snell and Dodgers agree to $182 million, 5-year contract, AP source says
item.description: Less than a month after winning the World Series, the Los Angeles Dodgers are spending big again to add one of baseball's best pitchers to their star-studded roster.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears CB Jaylon Johnson not interested in bright spots with team's skid at 5 games going into Thanksgiving
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — Jaylon Johnson wasn't all that interested in discussing any bright spots or reasons to have hope for the Bears. The star cornerback made his feelings clear.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Judge tosses suit to block trans athlete from NCAA women's tourney
item.description: The judge also noted in his ruling that "no defendant disputed that San Jose State rosters a trans woman volleyball player.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Wembanyama scores 34 as Spurs beat Jazz, 128-115
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - 17 games into the NBA season, the Utah Jazz and San Antonio Spurs have already played each other four times, and the Jazz have to be glad they don't have to see Victor Wembanyama again this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giants looked terrible after emotionally draining week
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Giants' performance yesterday was putrid. They got embarrassed by the Bucs 30-7. Tommy DeVito got mocked by Tampa quarterback Baker Mayfield. Boo's rained down at MetLife Stadium. Effort was not there.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11
